name: Pangs of Proserpina
Effect: The victim suffers feelings of intense hunger, provoking frenzy in Kindred.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Composure + Blood Potency

name: Rigor Mortis
Effect: The victim suffers the loss of the reanimating power of Vitae, penalizing his next physical action by a -3 die penalty.

name: The Mantle of Amorous Fire
Effect: The Acolyte dances into an ecstatic Condition, transmuting their form to become proud, fiery, and lusty, adding Crúac dots to Presence.
Prerequisites: Must dance through the entirety of the casting and enact the Blush of Life.

name: The Pool of Forbidden Truths
Effect: Divines truths beyond reality by spilling blood into a vessel, allowing the Acolyte to ask the Storyteller a single question per success.
Prerequisites: A vessel, basin, or cup to hold blood, and a vector for prophecy (tea, bones, etc.).

name: Sanguine Auger
Effect: The vampire drinks a target's blood to receive cryptic visions and learn hidden truths about them during her next daysleep.

name: Cheval
Effect: Allows the ritualist to see and hear what the subject does, no matter how far away she is, for the rest of the night.
Prerequisites: Subject must be present at the casting and physically touched by the ritualist.

name: The Hydra's Vitae
Effect: Transforms the ritualist's own blood into a poison that causes lethal damage to anyone who drinks it.

name: Donning the Beast's Flesh
Effect: Skins a beast to craft a mystical accessory that allows the wearer to take the rough shape of that animal.
Prerequisites: A skinned beast to craft a hood, cloak, mask, or other article of clothing.

name: Mantle of the Beast's Breath
Effect: The Acolyte enters a trance, gaining the Raptured Condition and adding her Crúac as a bonus to any rolls to ride the wave of frenzy.
Prerequisites: Must dance into a trance during the casting and enact Blush of Life.

name: Ma'at and Rauket
Effect: Introduces chaos into an area, disrupting spiritual influence and imposing penalties on actions the area would normally aid.

name: Doom of Osiris
Effect: Blesses a bladed weapon to deal aggravated damage to ephemeral beings and Strix for the rest of the night.

name: Deflection of Wooden Doom
Effect: Wards the ritualist from having his heart impaled; all attempts to stake the ritualist fail until the next sunrise.

name: Touch of the Morrigan
Effect: The ritualist pours the tearing force of his Beast into his hands, inflicting lethal wounds upon striking an opponent.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac (Requires a Dexterity + Brawl roll to touch)

name: Shed the Virulent Bowels
Effect: Causes the victim's gullet to split wide and eject his bowels, filling all his Health levels with lethal damage.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Stamina + Blood Potency
Prerequisites: A lock of hair, nail clipping, or other waste from the victim's body.

name: Curse of Aphrodite's Favor
Effect: Creates a potion that inflicts the effects of a full Vinculum on the victim, directed at the subject of the ritual.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Composure + Blood Potency

name: Curse of the Beloved Toy
Effect: Causes the victim's limbs to turn to stone, dealing damage and potentially rendering mortals dead or Kindred torpid.
Roll: Presence + Occult + Crúac (Resisted by victim's Stamina)
Prerequisites: A victim, and a beloved possession of the victim's. Must kill the victim as part of the ritual.

name: Gorgon's Gaze
Effect: Infects the Acolyte's eyes; the next time a character sees her eyes, their limbs turn to stone causing aggravated wounds.

name: Manananggal's Working
Effect: Allows the Acolyte to cut off parts of her body and have them move and perform tasks independently of her.
Prerequisites: Ritualist must sacrifice her own Vitae exclusively.

name: Wisdom of the Blood
Effect: Taps into the collective unconscious via a torpid vampire to receive brief prophetic answers to questions.

name: Ahmet's Pursuit
Effect: Curses a victim to suffer the Lost Condition and always take the worst route, while the vampire always knows where they run.
Prerequisites: Sethite Initiation Merit, a material focus (e.g., an effigy)

name: Feast of the Ra
Effect: Prepares an offering of Essence in the form of a meal to appease a Hollow Mekhet's Ka and avoid harassment.

name: Taurobolium
Effect: A blood bathing ritual that implants a fragment of divine glory into the subject, granting Striking Looks and social advantages.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Stamina + Blood Potency (if unwilling)
Prerequisites: Galloi Bloodline, bathing in Vitae and perfumes/oils sacred to Cybele.

name: Blood Price
Effect: The ritualist claims blood consumed by the ritual's subject, stealing their Vitae whenever they feed.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Composure + Blood Potency
Prerequisites: Subject must be a vampire or ghoul present for the casting.

name: Willful Vitae
Effect: The ritualist makes herself immune to Vinculum and blood addiction for the remainder of the night.

name: Mantle of the Glorious Dervish
Effect: Grants the Acolyte a point of armor, increased attack damage, and immunity to being ambushed.
Prerequisites: Must dance into a trance during casting and enact Blush of Life.

name: Bounty of the Storm
Effect: Curses a victim with the force of devastating storms that leave them battered and surrounded by dead bystanders, but rewarded with strange wealth.
Prerequisites: A deeply personal object from the victim at the time of casting.

name: Denying Hades
Effect: Pulls a recently dead mortal's spirit back into its corpse, reviving them fully conscious but still rotting.
Prerequisites: A mortal corpse dead no longer than one day per dot of the vampire's Blood Potency.

name: Clotho's Skein
Effect: Allows the vampire to walk the slumbering mind and see threads connecting all Kindred within a 1-mile radius.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Resolve + Blood Potency

name: The Hand of Seth
Effect: Compels a spirit or Strix to be expelled from its host body, returning to its Twilight form.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Resistance + Rank/Shadow Potency
Prerequisites: Sethite Initiation Merit, a scrap of the vessel's DNA

name: Blood Blight
Effect: Mystically destroys the victim's blood, causing lethal damage to mortals or destroying Vitae in Kindred.
Roll: Manipulation + Occult + Crúac vs. Stamina + Blood Potency

name: Feeding the Crone
Effect: Transforms the ritualist's fangs into a maw of flesh-tearing teeth that deals +2 aggravated damage but yields no Vitae.

name: Mantle of the Predator Goddess
Effect: The Acolyte becomes a perfect predator, adding Crúac dots to feeding rolls and the Herd Merit. Anyone fed upon gains the Raptured Condition.
Prerequisites: Must dance into a trance during casting and enact Blush of Life.

name: Birthing the God
Effect: A coven sacrifices body parts and Vitae to build and animate a terrifying, alien, patchwork abomination that acts as a minor god.
Prerequisites: Body parts to build a full humanoid form. Participants must each have at least one dot of Crúac.

name: Mantle of the Crone
Effect: The ritualist takes on the terrifying bearing of the Crone. Witnesses gain the Primeval Truths Condition, and her touch causes aggravated wounds.
Prerequisites: Must dance into a trance during casting.

name: Gwydion's Curse
Effect: Animates all trees and large plants within a radius, prompting them to attack anyone who comes within reach.

name: Scapegoat
Effect: Transfers the ritualist's banes and breaking points to a mortal victim for the duration.

name: The Thrashing of Apep's Coils
Effect: Calls on the power of storms to impose the Heavy Rains (and optionally Heavy Winds) Tilt over a mile radius.
